statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); dir_name=$(basename "$cwd"); cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git_info=""; if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git --no-optional-locks symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git --no-optional-locks rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then if ! git --no-optional-locks diff-index --quiet HEAD -- 2>/dev/null; then status="✗"; else status=""; fi; git_info=" $(printf '\033[34m')git:$(printf '\033[31m')$branch$(printf '\033[34m')$(printf '\033[0m')"; if [ -n "$status" ]; then git_info="$git_info $(printf '\033[33m')$status$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; fi; fi; printf '\033[36m%s\033[0m%s' "$dir_name" "$git_info"
